app.coverSubtitle: Choose your journey for a tailored guide

city.beijing.desc: Ancient capital. Must-see: Forbidden City, Great Wall, Temple of Heaven. Food: Peking duck, zhajiang noodles, hotpot lamb. Shop: Wangfujing, Panjiayuan antiques. Tip: book attractions in advance, metro is easy.
city.beijing.name: Beijing
city.chengdu.desc: #1 in central-west China. Must-see: Panda Base, Kuanzhai Alley, Jinli. Food: hotpot, chuanchuan, dandan noodles. Shop: panda brocade crafts. Tip: locals value "anyi" (comfort), take it slow.
city.chengdu.name: Chengdu
city.chongqing.desc: Fastest growing (+30%). Must-see: Hongyadong, Ciqikou, Yangtze cableway. Food: hotpot, xiaomian noodles, Jianghu cuisine. Shop: Jiefangbei. Tip: wear flats, GPS may fail in 8D terrain.
city.chongqing.name: Chongqing
city.fuzhou.desc: Coastal nature & heritage. Must-see: Sanfang Qixiang, Gushan, West Lake Park. Food: Buddha Jumps Over the Wall, fish balls, rouyan. Tip: abundant hot springs, wellness destination.
city.fuzhou.name: Fuzhou
city.guangzhou.desc: #1 in inbound spending. Must-see: Canton Tower, Shamian Island, Baiyun Mountain. Food: dim sum, roast meats, claypot rice. Shop: Tianhe malls, Baima clothing market. Tip: dense SE Asia flights, popular first stop.
city.guangzhou.name: Guangzhou
city.guiyang.desc: Korean "Seoul alternative", Western veggie haven. Must-see: Qianling Mountain, Qingyan Old Town, Huaxi. Food: sour soup fish, changwang noodles, siwawa wraps. Tip: cool summer escape.
city.guiyang.name: Guiyang
city.hangzhou.desc: Paradise on earth. Must-see: West Lake, Lingyin Temple, Longjing tea fields. Food: Dongpo pork, West Lake fish, Longjing shrimp. Shop: silk market, Southern Song Street. Tip: best in spring, avoid Golden Week.
city.hangzhou.name: Hangzhou
city.harbin.desc: SE Asia favorite. Must-see: Ice Festival, Zhongyang Street, St. Sophia. Food: guobaorou, red sausage, Russian cuisine. Shop: Russian imports on Zhongyang. Tip: -20°C in winter, bundle up.
city.harbin.name: Harbin
city.kunming.desc: Eternal spring. Must-see: Stone Forest, Dian Lake, Dounan flower market. Food: cross-bridge noodles, steam pot chicken, mushroom hotpot. Shop: fresh flowers, ethnic crafts. Tip: SE Asia gateway, pleasant year-round.
city.kunming.name: Kunming
city.qingdao.desc: Coastal gem. Must-see: Zhanqiao Pier, Badaguan, Laoshan. Food: seafood, Tsingtao beer, mackerel dumplings. Shop: Taidong pedestrian street. Tip: Beer Festival Jul-Aug, best in summer.
city.qingdao.name: Qingdao
city.shanghai.desc: 8.28M+ annual arrivals. Must-see: the Bund, Yu Garden, Disney. Food: xiaolongbao, shengjian, Shanghainese cuisine. Shop: Nanjing Rd, fabric market qipao. Tip: extensive metro, 72h transit visa usable.
city.shanghai.name: Shanghai
city.shenzhen.desc: China's Silicon Valley. Must-see: Huaqiangbei, Shenzhen Bay Park, OCT. Food: Chaoshan beef hotpot, seafood. Shop: Huaqiangbei electronics, MixC mall. Tip: 15min HSR to Hong Kong.
city.shenzhen.name: Shenzhen
city.taiyuan.desc: Black Myth: Wukong filming locations. Must-see: Jinci Temple, Twin Pagodas, Pingyao (nearby). Food: daoxiaomian noodles, guoyourou. Tip: follow the game trail, ancient architecture paradise.
city.taiyuan.name: Taiyuan
city.yiwu.desc: "World Small Commodity Capital". Flights +60% H1 2026. Must-visit: International Trade City (5 districts). Food: many Middle Eastern restaurants. Shop: phone cases to drones, one-stop.
city.yiwu.name: Yiwu
city.zhengzhou.desc: Hanfu street photography hotspot. Must-see: Erqi Tower, Henan Museum, Shaolin Temple (nearby). Food: huimian noodles, hulatang soup. Tip: wear traditional dress for photos, immersive Chinese aesthetic.
city.zhengzhou.name: Zhengzhou
clinic.jiahui.desc: JCI-standard, multilingual team. Surgical (soft tissue, abdominoplasty, body contouring) & non-surgical (Botox, fillers). 10+ intl surgical cases/year.
clinic.jiahui.name: Shanghai Jiahui Intl Hospital
clinic.mhwd.desc: International dept, multilingual. All services under proper medical licensing with compliant equipment. Led by dermatology & injection experts.
clinic.mhwd.name: MHWD·Dingxiang Clinic
clinic.rodeo.desc: American cross-border chain. US-trained physicians with international brand certifications. Language-matched service staff, internationally compliant protocols.
clinic.rodeo.name: RODEO (Shanghai)
clinic.yuansong.desc: Served clients from Korea, Japan, Middle East. Uses filler-based contouring instead of high-risk bone shaving. Natural aesthetics philosophy.
clinic.yuansong.name: YuanSong Aesthetics (Shanghai)

s1.title: Do I Need a Visa?
s1.sub: 3 questions. Nearly 80 countries visa-free or transit.

s10.title: Emergency+Exit
s10.passportWarningDetail: Carry always. Lost→police→consulate. Save embassy contacts.
s10.footer: 🧳 China Entry Guide · Updated July 2026 · Based on NIA & MFA public info · NIA 12367 · s.nia.gov.cn

s7.title: Medical & Aesthetics
s7.sub: 850+ institutions across 57 cities. Tap cards for details.

hospital.label: 🏥 Hospitals
hospital.title: Intl Hospitals & Meds
hospital.desc: Major city hospitals, trilingual meds list, travel insurance

cosmetic.label: 💉 Aesthetic
cosmetic.title: Laser·Injection·Surgery
cosmetic.desc: 1/3 of Korean prices. Laser treatments ideal for short-term. Clinic recommendations.

big3.label: 🦷👁️🌿 Big Three
big3.title: Dental·Eye·TCM
big3.desc: Implants <¥5K, glasses same-day, acupuncture & massage. #1 for Russians.

checkup.label: 📋 Checkup
checkup.title: Executive Checkup
checkup.desc: ¥2K-10K+, comprehensive panels, some 24h reports. Half-day visit.

hospital.title: 🏥 International Medical Services
hospital.intro: 850+ institutions across 57 cities. 1.28M international patients in 2025 (+73.6%).
hospital.insuranceDetail: Outpatient ¥800-1,500+. Intl dept registration ¥600-1,200. Recommend Cigna/Allianz/Bupa.

cosmetic.title: 💉 Aesthetic Medicine Guide
cosmetic.intro: 💡 ~1/3 of Korean prices. Korea ended foreigner plastic surgery tax refund in 2026.
cosmetic.sectionSurgery: 🔪 Surgical (Recovery needed — not for short stays)

jiahui.name: Shanghai Jiahui Intl Hospital
jiahui.subtitle: JCI·Multilingual·Surg+Non-surg
jiahui.desc: JCI-standard, multilingual team. Surgical (soft tissue, abdominoplasty, body contouring) & non-surgical (Botox, fillers). 10+ intl surgical cases/year.

mhwd.name: MHWD·Dingxiang Clinic
mhwd.subtitle: Intl Dept·Compliant·Personalized
mhwd.desc: International dept, multilingual. All services under proper medical licensing with compliant equipment. Led by dermatology & injection experts.

rodeo.name: RODEO (Shanghai)
rodeo.subtitle: American Chain·US Background
rodeo.desc: American cross-border chain. US-trained physicians with international brand certifications. Language-matched service staff, internationally compliant protocols.

yuansong.name: YuanSong Aesthetics (Shanghai)
yuansong.subtitle: KR/JP/MidEast clients·Natural
yuansong.desc: Served clients from Korea, Japan, Middle East. Uses filler-based contouring instead of high-risk bone shaving. Natural aesthetics philosophy.

big3.title: 🦷👁️🌿 Medical "Big Three"
big3.eyeDesc: Glasses same-day service. Laser eye surgery ¥8K-20K. Recommended: Shanghai Eye & ENT Hospital.
big3.tcmHotspotsDetail: Sanya TCM Hospital(intl)·Heihe TCM(RU service,2000+/yr)·Hunchun Hospital(RU interpreter)·Raohe TCM(baths+massage)

checkup.title: 📋 Health Checkup
checkup.intro: Major hospitals offer executive checkups, ¥2K-10K+. Some 24h reports. No overnight stay, half-day visit.
checkup.recommended: Recommended: PUMCH Intl, Huashan Intl, Jiahui Intl
checkup.warningDetail: Book 1-2 weeks ahead. Fasting required for some tests. Consult doctor about medications.

s8.title: Shopping & Tax Refund
s8.sub: Tax refund travelers +305% in 2025. 12,252 stores, 7,000+ instant refund.

electronics.label: 📱 Electronics
electronics.title: Foldables·Drones·AI Glasses
electronics.desc: Huaqiangbei SZ, Wangfujing BJ, Yiwu. Latest tech at great prices.

souvenirs.label: 🎨 Souvenirs
souvenirs.title: Palace Museum·Craft·Local
souvenirs.desc: Forbidden City magnets, Chengdu panda brocade, Xi'an plush, Guizhou indigo.

taxrefund.label: 💰 Tax Refund
taxrefund.title: Rules·Process·Instant
taxrefund.desc: ≥¥500 same store→11% VAT (~9% net). Depart within 90d. 7,000+ instant refund.

cityshops.label: 🗺️ City Guide
cityshops.title: Shopping by City
cityshops.desc: SH Fabric Market·SZ Electronics·Yiwu Wholesale·Sanya Duty-Free·BJ Wangfujing

electronics.title: 📱 Electronics & Gadgets
electronics.whereToBuyDetail: SZ Huaqiangbei—"China Electronics Street",35 markets,multilingual+cards+tax refund. BJ Wangfujing—flagship stores. Yiwu—"World Supermarket",one-stop.

souvenirs.title: 🎨 Cultural Souvenirs
souvenirs.tip: 💡 Cultural shops cluster near scenic spots and heritage streets

taxrefund.title: 💰 Tax Refund Guide
taxrefund.stats: 📊 12,252 refund stores nationwide. +305% refund travelers in 2025.
taxrefund.instantRefundDetail: 7,000+ stores: deduct at purchase, no airport queue. Shanghai city-wide. Hainan duty-free.

shenzhen.name: Shenzhen·Huaqiangbei
shenzhen.subtitle: China Electronics Street
shenzhen.desc: "China Electronics Street",35 specialized markets. Categories: phones, accessories, drones, wearables. Multilingual signs+intl cards+tax refund. Metro Line 1 Huaqiang Rd. Tip: compare prices, some markets negotiable.

shanghai.name: Shanghai·Fabric Market
shanghai.subtitle: Qipao & Suit Tailoring
shanghai.desc: South Bund Fabric Market etc. Custom qipao & suits, measured on-site. ¥300-2,000+, 2-3 day turnaround. Intl cards accepted.

yiwu.name: Yiwu·Trade City
yiwu.subtitle: World Supermarket
yiwu.desc: "World Supermarket", phone cases to smart appliances to drones. Flight bookings +60% H1 2026. One-stop shopping, multilingual+intl cards.

sanya.name: Sanya·Duty Free Mall
sanya.subtitle: Offshore Duty-Free
sanya.desc: Offshore & departure duty-free. Full range of intl brands. Policy upgraded 2025. Simple process: register→scan→pay→airport pickup, <3min.

beijing.name: Beijing·Wangfujing
beijing.subtitle: Flagship·Heritage
beijing.desc: Flagship electronics stores, heritage brands+modern malls. Same-day glasses. Dense tax refund stores with instant refund.

seasons.title: 🌍 Seasonal Picks

spring.title: 🌸 Spring (Mar-May)
spring.desc: Mild & pleasant. Hangzhou West Lake·Suzhou Gardens·Kunming flowers.

summer.title: 🌿 Summer (Jun-Aug)
summer.desc: Escape heat: Beidaihe/Qingdao. Beer Festival·Harbin cool·Zhangjiajie.

autumn.title: 🍂 Autumn (Sep-Nov) Best!
autumn.desc: Best nationwide. Beijing red leaves·Xi'an ancient city·Guilin scenery.

winter.title: ❄️ Winter (Dec-Feb)
winter.desc: North ice vs South sun. Harbin Ice Festival(SE Asia fav)·Sanya tropics(Russian fav).

seasons.sizingTip: 👔 Sizing: CN 1-2 smaller than US. US M≈CN L/XL. Uniqlo/ZARA global sizing.
